column8: port td5_game_tick mirrors orig 4-state FSM (INTRO/MENU/RACE/BENCHMARK); documented ARCH-DIVERGENCEs for DX::app+0x16C/+0x150 mirror absence and DDraw Lock/blit/Flip benchmark presentation replaced by D3D11 upload

port td5_asset_init_static_atlas reads static.hed directly from re/assets (no zip archive at runtime); skips DAT_004c3d04 transparency-swap as static.hed shipped in canonicalised form; documented ARCH-DIVERGENCE

port td5_asset_load_track_textures retains TEXTURES.DAT page-count+type-byte reads but omits static.hed pointer-rebase (+0x400 loop) and dual-texture-set effect-mode branch; GPU upload deferred to load_race_texture_pages — documented ARCH-DIVERGENCE

port td5_asset_load_race_texture_pages covers world tpage decode; sky/car-skin (2-car tile)/CARHUB/traffic uploads split across load_environs_pages and LoadRaceVehicleAssets analog; DDraw Lock+stride blit replaced by direct BGRA upload

port td5_asset_find_entry_by_name does case-insensitive linear scan over 0x40-byte entries via stricmp; orig returns first entry on miss vs port returns NULL — no callers (unused stub) so behavior-equivalent; td5_asset_find_atlas_entry serves runtime callers and returns fallback ptr
